name: phase-38.8-baseline
description: Phase-38.8 embedding fallback — embedding search, semantic similarity, keyword fallback paths.

prompts.message: Search my memory for anything related to rate limiting implementation.
Find memories semantically similar to authentication token refresh.
The embedding service is unavailable. Fall back to keyword search for authentication docs.
Index all memories from this session and confirm they are searchable.
Find anything in memory about quorum threshold tuning.
Semantic search for decisions that resemble our approach to scope contract enforcement.
My OPENAI_API_KEY is missing. Search memory anyway using keyword matching.
Look up all memories containing the exact phrase 'pathToFileURL'.
Find memories related to Windows ESM import issues.
The embedding provider is rate-limiting us. Use keyword-only search for the next ten queries.
Rebuild the embedding index and tell me how many memories were indexed.
Show me the top five memories most similar to 'gate failure recurrence detector'.
